description: Declarative ingredients for the stone-soup experiment. Private collaborator material stays behind adapters; tracked outputs are redacted.

ingredients.label: Rendereason (APO/RH mathematics)
ingredients.notes: Collaborator IP. Reports record atom IDs, titles, and truncated summaries only.

ingredients.label: angrybob (admissibility / calculus)
ingredients.notes: Archive and SQLite structure introspection only — member names, table names, and row counts; never file contents or DB cell values.

ingredients.label: Stone Soup Papers (Oakenscroll theory source)
kb_queries: stone soup grandmother encoding decoder mismatch Oakenscroll
recipe priors compliance comprehension stone soup
ingredients.notes: Protected theory text. Reports extract only section labels, theorem labels, and short concept names.

ingredients.label: Oakenscroll (governance / pedagogy frame)
kb_queries: UTETY Emerging Rule Dual Commit governance
ingredients.notes: Repo-safe persona overlay and KB atoms; no private Seed JSON required for dry run.

willow_layers.label: Postgres KB
willow_layers.question: What long-term atoms are already alive around the ingredients?

willow_layers.label: SOIL local store
willow_layers.question: What structured local state is present without reading private values?

willow_layers.label: Jeles corpus
willow_layers.question: What high-confidence extracted corpus signals are nearby?

willow_layers.label: Grove message bus
willow_layers.question: What recent fleet messages frame the pot?

willow_layers.label: FRANK ledger
willow_layers.question: What tamper-evident decisions constrain the boil?

willow_layers.label: Session handoffs
willow_layers.question: What continuity thread says what to carry forward?

willow_layers.label: Benchmark atlas
willow_layers.question: Which existing harnesses can this extend instead of duplicating?

willow_layers.label: Kart task plane
willow_layers.question: Is there execution residue that changes the session state?

willow_layers.label: Policy and human gates
willow_layers.question: What requires ratification, consent, or explicit gaps?

willow_layers.label: Code context
willow_layers.question: Which repo files are now part of the pot?

willow_layers.label: Oakenscroll governance overlay
willow_layers.question: What epistemic discipline should judge the result?

willow_layers.label: Existing synthesis anchors
willow_layers.question: Which prior syntheses does this pot have to preserve and connect?
